ddls:
CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sport the competition belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competition */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the competition */,
  "competition_type" TEXT /* Type of competition (e.g., track and field, cross-country) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season the competition belongs to */,
  "document_link" TEXT /* Link to detailed documentation for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competitions_sport_id FOREIGN KEY ("sport_id") REFERENCES sports ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sport */,
  "scoring_criteria" TEXT /* Scoring criteria for the sport */,
  "timing_criteria" TEXT /* Timing criteria for the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university the team represents */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the university */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competition_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "total_time" TEXT /* Total time taken by the team */,
  "avg_time" TEXT /* Average time per round */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score of the team */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the result entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competition_results_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "round_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round score */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the competition result */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Number of the round */,
  "round_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team in the round */,
  "round_time" TEXT /* Time taken in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_round_scores_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES competition_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, athlete, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
